name: Versioning
summary: Static class that provides information regarding the Grasshopper versioning.

methods.name: SyncVersionHistoryData
methods.summary: Attempts to download the version history information. The downloaded data (if the download works) will eventually be stored at: Grasshopper.Folders.VersionHistoryFile

methods.name: VersionHistoryData
methods.summary: Gets the currently most up-to-date version history data.

returns.doc: The latest version history or null if no such record exists.

properties.name: BuildDate
properties.summary: Gets the build date string. This is the visible release iteration tag. Typically the BuildDate is just the date (MMMM-dd, yyyy), but it may carry a prefix or suffix for special builds.

properties.name: Version
properties.summary: Gets the version of the current build of Grasshopper.

properties.name: VersionString
properties.summary: Gets the version of the current build of Grasshopper.
